fields.label: API Key
fields.helpText: Claim your free API key at alphavantage.co/support/#api-key

healthcheck_config.description: Validates API key via Alpha Vantage Market Status endpoint

metadata.summary: Alpha Vantage for real-time and historical stock, forex, crypto, and economic data.
metadata.setup_guide:
1. Go to alphavantage.co/support/#api-key
2. Enter your email and a description
3. Click 'Get Free API Key'
4. Copy the API key and paste it here
